claims_governance.note: Allowed claims are supported by the evidence architecture. Blocked claims require additional evidence or contractual support.

five_nines_reliability.note: Five-nines reliability requires exact report fingerprint, command, environment, thresholds, and approved claim language

quantum_advantage.note: Quantum advantage requires repeated environment-controlled evidence and approved thresholds

regulatory_compliance.note: Regulatory compliance requires customer deployment context, controller/processor analysis, and use-case classification

sla_commitment.note: SLA commitments require signed agreement expressly incorporating the exact report fingerprint, command, environment, thresholds, and approved claim language

note: This report separates observed benchmark evidence from SLA commitments. No unsubstantiated claims are made.
